p3_system_nihilus: >>> WARNING: Entity detected. Classification: UNKNOWN. Power level: ERROR - MEASUREMENT RANGE EXCEEDED.
p3_nihilus_greeting: You are the 47th attempt. None have ever succeeded. But please... try. It amuses me.
p3_protag_confront: Nihilus! For everything you've done to the worlds - it ends today!
p3_nihilus_amused: Ends? Hm. You don't even know what I am. But come. Show me your strength.
p3_nihilus_bored: Boring. Like the 46 before you. Not even close.
p3_system_critical: >>> CRITICAL: Party damage 87%. HP all members: CRITICAL. Combat continuation: NOT RECOMMENDED.
p3_aria_shield: I WON'T LET YOU TOUCH HIM! NOT HIM!
p3_aria_fallen: Run... please... you have to... live...
p3_protag_aria_no: ARIA! No... not you too... not you...
p3_aldric_spell: Forgive me, old friend. I've been preparing this spell for a long time. Forbidden time magic - it will send you back.
p3_protag_aldric_what: Aldric?! What are you doing?! Your body... it's disintegrating!
p3_aldric_goodbye: Next time... it will be different. You'll be stronger. Find the others. And then... then you'll defeat him. Farewell... my friend.
p3_system_rift: >>> TIME RIFT DETECTED. SPACE-TIME CONTINUUM: COLLAPSING. EMERGENCY PROTOCOL ACTIVATED.
p3_nihilus_warning: You cannot escape time. I will ALWAYS be here. In every era. In every world.
p3_aldric_final: You're wrong, Nihilus. This time... I gave him a gift.
p3_system_falling: >>> Level... dropping... 50... 42... 31... 18... 7... 1... Skills: DELETED. Equipment: DELETED. Memories: CORRUPTED...
p3_system_aria_init: >>> Sy...stem... init...ialized... Error... Memories... corrupted... Fragment saved: A.R.I.A.
p3_protag_where: Where... am I? What... who am I? My head... everything is spinning...
p3_system_reboot: >>> ...System fragment online. Data integrity: 3%. User recognized: Unknown. Level: 1. Location: Forest clearing, unknown region. Recommendation: Survive.
